_readme: Hand-written evaluation cases (subject: Population & Census). Mixed English/Arabic and numeric/descriptive so both answering paths and both languages are exercised. 'expected_dataset' scores ROUTING independently of ANSWER text. 'expected_answer_contains' is a loose substring check; leave '' for numeric cases whose exact figure depends on the (currently synthetic) data. A few cases deliberately stress the region-vs-nationality ambiguity. Extend toward ~20 cases as you add datasets.

questions.question: What was the population of the Riyadh region in 2022?
كم عدد سكان منطقة مكة المكرمة؟
How many people are in the 25-39 age group?
كم عدد السكان في الفئة العمرية 65 سنة فأكثر؟
How many non-Saudis live in the Eastern Province?
كم عدد السعوديين في منطقة الرياض؟
What did the Saudi Census 2022 measure?
How many men live in Tabuk?
questions._note: stress: 'men' should map to the region gender breakdown, not nationality

questions.question: كم عدد غير السعوديين في المنطقة الشرقية؟
questions._note: stress: Arabic non-Saudi nationality question vs region dataset

questions.question: How many households are there in the Eastern Province?
كم عدد الأسر في منطقة مكة المكرمة؟
What is the population density of the Riyadh region?
ما هي الكثافة السكانية في منطقة تبوك؟
questions._note: stress: density vs region population dataset
